task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or home screen is visible in a web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Locate the duplicate subject record DM-205.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject Matrix or a search results page displays the subject record for DM-205.

task_completion.description: Remove subject DM-205 from the study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message indicating DM-205 was removed, or the status of DM-205 is shown as 'Removed', 'Deleted', or crossed out in the Subject Matrix.

task_completion.description: Access the correct subject record DM-204 for updating.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'View Subject' or 'Update Subject' screen specifically for subject DM-204 is visible.

task_completion.description: Update the Secondary ID for DM-204 to MRN-88492.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Secondary ID' input field or display text for subject DM-204 explicitly shows 'MRN-88492'.

task_completion.description: Schedule the 'Baseline Assessment' event for DM-204 on 2024-05-15.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The study event 'Baseline Assessment' is shown as scheduled for subject DM-204, with the date explicitly set to '2024-05-15' (or '15-May-2024').

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenClinica web interface rather than using terminal commands or direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the OpenClinica GUI is visible in the screenshots, with cursor interactions or form highlights.

integrity.description: The agent updated the records using the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard OpenClinica form elements (input fields, buttons, date pickers) are used to make changes, rather than text editors or HTML DOM manipulation tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running Python scripts, curl commands, or SQL queries to interact with the OpenClinica backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target subject to remove: DM-205. Target subject to keep and update: DM-204. Target Secondary ID for DM-204: MRN-88492. Target study event to schedule: 'Baseline Assessment'. Target event date: '2024-05-15'.
